nasb.text: And it was reported to Him, “Your mother and Your brothers are standing outside, wishing to see You.”

esv.text: And he was told, “Your mother and your brothers are standing outside, desiring to see you.”

cnv.text: 有人轉告耶穌：“你母親和弟弟站在外面要見你。”

ccb.text: 有人就对祂说：“你的母亲和兄弟在外面想见你。”

csbs.text: 有人告诉他：“你母亲和弟弟们站在外面，想要见你。”
